tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by: J.A.
Band- 3 Doors Down
Song- Let Me Go
Album- Seventeen Days
Tuning- Standard


This is the first time and one of my longest projects. Enjoy.

Intro:
[ch]E[/ch], [ch]D[/ch], [ch]C[/ch], [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]E[/ch], [ch]D[/ch], [ch]Am[/ch], [ch]D[/ch]

Verse:
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
One more kiss could be the best thing[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
One more lie could be the worst[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
And all these thoughts are never resting[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
And you're not something I deserve[/tab]

Prechorus:
[tab][ch]E[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
In my head there's only you now[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
This world falls on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
In this world, there's real and make-believe[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
This seems real to me[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
You love me but you don't know who I am[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I'm torn between this life I lead and where I stand[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
You love me but you don't know who I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
So let me go,  Let me go[/tab]

Repeat Intro

Verse 2:
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I dream ahead to what I hope for[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
And I turn my back on loving you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
How can this love be a good thing?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I not know what I'm going through[/tab]

Prechorus:
In my head there's only you now
This world falls on me
In this world, there's real and make-believe
This seems real to me

Chorus:
You love me but you don't know who I am
I'm torn between this life I lead and where I stand
You love me but you don't know who I am
So let me go
Just let me go
Let me go

Bridge:
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
And no matter how hard I try[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
I can't escape these things inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
I know, I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
When all the pieces fall apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
You will be the only one who knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Who knows  [/tab]

Chorus:
You love me but you don't know who I am
I'm torn between this life I lead and where I stand
You love me but you don't know who I am
So let me go
Just let me go

Outro:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
You love me but you don't   You love me but you don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]        
You love me but you don't know who I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
You love me but you don't   You love me but you don't[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
You love me but you don't know me[/tab]
